'''âp-b-h-t''' ('''kapabhetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lollpoop|lollpoop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lollpoop|lollpoop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-b-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapabhetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabhetoko|thipabhetoko]] || [[word:jipabhetoko|jipabhetoko]] || [[word:shipabhetoko|shipabhetoko]] || [[word:kipabhetoko|kipabhetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabhetoko|thuthupabhetoko]] || [[word:jujupabhetoko|jujupabhetoko]] || [[word:shushupabhetoko|shushupabhetoko]] || [[word:kukupabhetoko|kukupabhetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabhetoko|thupabhetoko]] || [[word:jupabhetoko|jupabhetoko]] || [[word:shupabhetoko|shupabhetoko]] || [[word:kupabhetoko|kupabhetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabhetoko|thupabhetoko]] || [[word:jupabhetoko|jupabhetoko]] || [[word:shupabhetoko|shupabhetoko]] || [[word:kupabhetoko|kupabhetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabhetoko|thepabhetoko]] || [[word:jepabhetoko|jepabhetoko]] || [[word:shepabhetoko|shepabhetoko]] || [[word:kepabhetoko|kepabhetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabhetoko|thothopabhetoko]] || [[word:jojopabhetoko|jojopabhetoko]] || [[word:shoshopabhetoko|shoshopabhetoko]] || [[word:kokopabhetoko|kokopabhetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabhetoko|thopabhetoko]] || [[word:jopabhetoko|jopabhetoko]] || [[word:shopabhetoko|shopabhetoko]] || [[word:kopabhetoko|kopabhetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabhetoko|thopabhetoko]] || [[word:jopabhetoko|jopabhetoko]] || [[word:shopabhetoko|shopabhetoko]] || [[word:kopabhetoko|kopabhetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpabhetoko|thĂŠpabhetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpabhetoko|jĂŠpabhetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpabhetoko|shĂŠpabhetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpabhetoko|kĂŠpabhetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabhetoko|thathapabhetoko]] || [[word:jajapabhetoko|jajapabhetoko]] || [[word:shashapabhetoko|shashapabhetoko]] || [[word:kakapabhetoko|kakapabhetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabhetoko|thapabhetoko]] || [[word:japabhetoko|japabhetoko]] || [[word:shapabhetoko|shapabhetoko]] || [[word:kapabhetoko|kapabhetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabhetoko|thapabhetoko]] || [[word:japabhetoko|japabhetoko]] || [[word:shapabhetoko|shapabhetoko]] || [[word:kapabhetoko|kapabhetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapabhetithi|shapabhetithi]] || [[word:shapabhetiji|shapabhetiji]] || [[word:shapabhetishi|shapabhetishi]] || [[word:shapabhetiki|shapabhetiki]]
